message:
chore(deps): update dependencies (tempfile, tracing-subscriber, assert_cmd, which, console, CI actions)

Cargo dependencies:
- tempfile: 3.25.0 → 3.27.0
- tracing-subscriber: 0.3.22 → 0.3.23
- assert_cmd: 2.1.2 → 2.2.0
- which: 8.0.1 → 8.0.2
- console: 0.16.2 → 0.16.3

GitHub Actions:
- marocchino/sticky-pull-request-comment: v2 → v3
- dawidd6/action-download-artifact: v16 → v17

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
